stories.title: Add missing Korean stock names to data_loader.py
Fix get_all_rankings to aggregate cross-channel data
acceptanceCriteria: get_all_rankings sums appearances across all channels for each ticker
get_all_rankings tracks list of source channels per ticker
get_all_rankings computes weighted average score (not just max)
Dashboard summary tab shows multi-channel stock entries with correct aggregated data

stories.title: Add all-channel macro aggregate to macro tab
acceptanceCriteria: Macro tab has '전체 (통합)' as first option in channel selector
Selecting '전체 (통합)' aggregates macro signals from all channels
Aggregated macro data shows de-duplicated indicators with summed frequencies

stories.title: Re-generate DASHBOARD.md with fresh pipeline data
acceptanceCriteria: Cross-channel top stocks section uses aggregated multi-channel data
